message:
fix: add --limit 0 to queue listing for correct FIFO ordering (gt-mo4xj)

listUnclaimedQueueMessages was missing --limit 0 in its bd list call,
unlike listChannelMessages and listAnnounceMessages. Default pagination
could truncate results, causing newer messages to be claimed before
older ones in large queues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -170,6 +170,7 @@ func listUnclaimedQueueMessages(beadsDir, queueName string) ([]queueMessage, err
 		"--status", "open",
 		"--type", "message",
 		"--json",
+		"--limit", "0",
 	}
 
 	cmd := exec.Command("bd", args...)
